prompt: A polished anime-style international film poster with a cinematic, slightly painterly look and soft natural lighting. Center the composition on a young woman shown from mid-thigh up, standing in a relaxed pose with one hand in the pocket of an oversized navy zip hoodie. The hoodie has two yellow athletic stripes running down each sleeve, a loose hood, and a partially open zipper over a fitted white tank top with thin black straps visible underneath. She wears a black choker and a single dark dangling earring. Her hair is a short platinum-silver bob with long side-swept bangs and a smooth, airy texture. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone. Keep the overall styling elegant and restrained rather than overly detailed, with a more natural, believable finish than flashy hyper-rendered anime art. Build the background as a travel-movie collage made of diagonal panel slices: one panel shows a coastal Mediterranean-style town on cliffs beside calm blue water with distant birds; one panel shows a rural railway line with a train on the left and utility poles along the tracks; one panel shows snow-covered mountains and a winding road in a quiet valley; one panel shows a dusky city skyline with glowing lights; and one panel shows a seaside road curving along the coast at sunset. Use a soft cream, blue, and slate palette with a nostalgic spring-travel mood. Add elegant festival-award laurels on the upper left, exactly 3 stacked laurels with Spanish text indicating major animation festival awards. Add large centered title typography near the bottom reading VIAJES DE PRIMAVERA, with a refined serif font in pale ivory. Beneath it, add a smaller italic tagline in Spanish reading Cada destino cambia su corazón.. Add a release line below that reading PRÓXIMAMENTE EN CINES. Include tiny production-credit text and a small studio logo at the very bottom. The image should feel like an arthouse animated movie poster advertising a spring journey drama, with balanced negative space, premium layout design, and realistic printed-poster typography.
